rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the same core scope violation (premature Layer-5/6 stubs + IsUnipotent before any Layer 0-1 prerequisites exist and with no path in the diff), whose removal would equally improve the PR; Review 2's extra 'don't bundle' nit on AffineAlgGroup is not material to scope and would at best yield a contested refactor with no better merged state than Review 1's single-unit split guidance.
